preamble: Epenthesis of [m] is a rare historical development, documented in the transition from Sanskrit to Middle Indo-Aryan (Pali and Prakrit).

examples.note: Nasal [m] inserted before fricative; the anusvara (ṃ) represents the epenthetic nasal consonant.
Sanskrit mr → Pali mb: epenthetic stop inserted between nasal and liquid, with subsequent changes.
